review: A sci-fi epic that actually earns its length. The world-building is meticulous without being overwhelming, and the hard science is explained in a way that never loses you. The final act is the most thrilling thing I've read in years. Essential reading for the genre.

examples.review: Absolute trash. Poorly written, boring plot, total waste of money.
It was fine. Not great, not terrible. A decent read to pass the time.
A masterpiece. Every page pulled me deeper in. One of the best books I've ever read.
